name: Barbarian
description: A primal warrior who channels rage into devastating physical power

name: Bard
description: A versatile performer who uses magic
column14: and skill to influence the world

name: Cleric
description: A divine spellcaster who channels the power of a deity to heal

name: Druid
description: A nature-bound spellcaster who channels the forces of the natural world

name: Fighter
description: A master of combat techniques adaptable to any battlefield role

name: Monk
description: A disciplined martial artist who channels inner energy for supernatural feats

name: Paladin
description: A holy warrior bound by sacred oaths who channels divine power in battle

name: Ranger
description: A skilled tracker and hunter who blends martial skill with nature magic

name: Rogue
description: A stealthy expert who relies on precision

name: Sorcerer
description: A spellcaster whose magic is innate and fueled by internal power

name: Warlock
description: A pact-bound spellcaster who gains power from an otherworldly patron

name: Wizard
description: A scholarly spellcaster who masters magic through study and preparation
